creator: kris@hub.freebsd.org
text:
On Fri, 15 Oct 1999, ls wrote:

> The right answer is:
> 
> | $ pgp5
> | PGP is now invoked from different executables for different operations:
> | 
> | pgpe    Encrypt (including Encrypt/Sign)
> | pgps    Sign
> | pgpv    Verify/Decrypt
> | pgpk    Key management
> | pgpo    PGP 2.6.2 command-line simulator (not yet implemented)
> | 
> | See each application's respective man page or the general PGP documentation
> | for more information.

Oh, I see - the usage message was broken. Now that I think about it, this
is probably because we renamed the executable from pgp -> pgp5 to not
conflict with the pgp 2.x port. Thanks for noticing this.

Kris

----
XOR for AES -- join the campaign!
